mapper.sql: SELECT route_id, route_name, route_code, dept_id, dept_name, cycle_type, cycle_value, equipment_ids, inspection_items, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM dms_inspection_route
mapper.delete: UPDATE dms_inspection_route SET del_flag = '2' WHERE route_id IN #{routeId}
mapper.select: SELECT route_code FROM dms_inspection_route WHERE route_code LIKE 'RT%' ORDER BY route_code DESC LIMIT 1
